title: A2A Message
description: The canonical request/response schema for all Agent-to-Agent communication in the starter project. Every Specialist Agent must accept requests and return responses conforming to this schema.

request.title: Agent Request
request.description: Sent by the Orchestrator to a Specialist Agent's /run endpoint.

task.description: Short intent keyword used by the Orchestrator for routing. e.g. 'echo', 'search', 'calculate'

input.description: The user's input or query to be processed by the agent.

context.description: Optional metadata passed from the Orchestrator. Agents may use or ignore this.

request_id.description: Optional UUID for tracing a request through the system.

response.title: Agent Response
response.description: Returned by a Specialist Agent after processing a request.

agent.description: The name of the agent that handled the request. e.g. 'echo', 'search'

status.description: Whether the agent successfully handled the request.

output.description: The agent's response to the input. Empty string on error.

error.description: Human-readable error message. Present only when status is 'error'.

request_id.description: Echo of the request_id from the incoming request, if provided.

metadata.description: Optional metadata from the agent (e.g. sources, confidence, tokens used).
